text.title: Timeboxed Refactor Session Template Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Timeboxed Refactor Session Template methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Session record names a single goal in ≤140 chars. 'general cleanup' / 'improve code' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Session record names a single goal in ≤140 chars. 'general cleanup' / 'improve code' forbidden.

rule.statement: duration_minutes is set BEFORE start. Default 120. Adjustment mid-session forbidden — abort and reschedule instead.
rule.rationale: duration_minutes is set BEFORE start. Default 120. Adjustment mid-session forbidden — abort and reschedule instead.

rule.statement: Record names ≥3 abort triggers (e.g. test runtime > 10min, scope expansion, broken main). On any trigger the session aborts and rolls back.
rule.rationale: Record names ≥3 abort triggers (e.g. test runtime > 10min, scope expansion, broken main). On any trigger the session aborts and rolls back.

rule.statement: Commit every ≤30 minutes during the session. Long sessions without commits = scope creep signal.
rule.rationale: Commit every ≤30 minutes during the session. Long sessions without commits = scope creep signal.

rule.statement: Record names a single measurable exit criterion (test passes / metric improved / file count reduced). 'feels better' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Record names a single measurable exit criterion (test passes / metric improved / file count reduced). 'feels better' forbidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-timeboxed-refactor-session-template.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
